title: Light Up Dancing Dino RC T-Rex Dinosaur Predator With Radio Control - Brown
description:
Is your child a dinosaur fanatic? Then they need the TychoTyke Dancing Dino T-Rex Predator RC Toy! This unique interactive toy is designed with education in mind. Children can travel back to the Mesozoic area with their very own T-Rex lookalike! It features the T-Rex's iconic spikes and has a roaring sound that will allow your child to pretend they are playing with the apex predator from millions of years ago. The toy itself is constructed of high-quality durable plastic that can withstand hours of indoor or outdoor play. It also comes with a wireless remote control that will allow kids to make the dino walk and dance! The remote has 5 functions - forward movement, roar, dance, fast forward and stop

Light Up Dancing Dino RC T-Rex Dinosaur Predator With Radio Control - Brown

Is your child a dinosaur fanatic? Then they need the TychoTyke Dancing Dino T-Rex Predator RC Toy!

This unique interactive toy is designed with education in mind. Children can travel back to the Mesozoic area with their very own T-Rex lookalike! It features the T-Rex's iconic spikes and has a roaring sound that will allow your child to pretend they are playing with the apex predator from millions of years ago.

Key Features

  • EDUCATIONAL TOY - Dinosaur T-Rex Predator Toy Teaches Kids About Mesozoic Era | Iconic Rex Spikes, Arms and Feet
  • INTERACTIVE RC DESIGN - Comes with Fossil Shaped Remote Control with 5 Functions | Dino Can Dance, Move Forward, Fast Forward, Roar and Stop for Ultimate Pretend Experience
  • HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL - Made of Durable Plastic Ideal for Indoor or Outdoor Play | Requires 5 AA Batteries (Not Included)
  • CHILD SIZED - Dinosaur is 11" Tall | Ideal Size for Young Kids | Safe for Children Ages 3 and Up
  • LIGHTS UP - T-Rex's Eyes and Back Light Up During Playtime | Great Gift to Keep Kids' Attention

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KFP-RCDNO016
  • UPC: 885189178449
  • Color: Brown
  • Size: Large

The toy itself is constructed of high-quality durable plastic that can withstand hours of indoor or outdoor play. It also comes with a wireless remote control that will allow kids to make the dino walk and dance! The remote has 5 functions - forward movement, roar, dance, fast forward and stop.

In addition to this dino's cool moves, it lights up with a press of the fossil footprint button! The combination of lifelike design and fun sounds, lights and movements make this a great gift idea for young kids and dinosaur enthusiasts.

Requires 5 AA batteries (not included), ideal for ages 3 and up.
